meta.title: OprPay · USDT to PIX, instant
meta.description: Get your USDT straight to PIX, instantly. No signup, no KYC, no red tape. Polygon network supported.

how.title: How it works
how.body: Paying has never been easier. Four quick steps, no sign-up, no friction. Set the amount and PIX key, pay the USDT QR Code on the Polygon network and receive reais in seconds.

1.title: Network and amount
1.hint: Polygon network. Type in USDT or in reais; we convert with the current rate.

2.title: Enter the PIX key
2.hint: CPF, email, phone or random key.

3.title: Return wallet
3.hint: Your USDT wallet for refunds if anything fails and an email for the receipt.

differentials.title: Easy, secure and instant.
differentials.sub: Discover the future of payments and transact with USDT.

instant.title: Instant operations
instant.body: Don't waste time worrying about delays. Payment straight to the PIX network.

secure.title: 100% secure
secure.body: Send with security. The end of friction in payments.

always.title: Transfer 24/7
always.body: 7 days a week, 24 hours a day.

networks.title: Polygon
networks.body: We run on the most-used USDT network. Polygon: low fees and fast confirmation.

fee.title: Lowest fees on the market
fee.body: You know exactly what you pay before you confirm.

noKyc.title: Easy, fast, no sign-up
noKyc.body: Pay anyone with USDT. Your wallet, your PIX key, your control.

trust.title: Transactions without friction.

speed.label: Average time from QR paid to PIX received

trust.footnote: OprPay operational indicators. Average time based on the last 30 days of transactions.

networks.title: Polygon, live and ready.
networks.body: We accept USDT on the Polygon network, with the best fees on the market and fast confirmation.
networks.polygonBody: The cheapest and fastest USDT network available. No waiting, no expensive gas, no headache.
networks.footnote: Support for other networks may be evaluated based on demand.

about.title: Transforming the future of payments.
about.body: On OprPay you swap USDT to PIX (BRL) the easy way, fast and secure. Send instant payments to Brazilian accounts without friction.
about.highlight: Transact in Brazil, no sign-up, easy and instant.

q1.question: How fast does PIX arrive after I pay USDT?
q1.answer: As soon as the USDT transaction is confirmed on-chain, PIX is automatically triggered. End-to-end usually takes 12 to 30 seconds, depending on Polygon network confirmation.

q2.question: Do I need to sign up?
q2.answer: No. You set the amount, paste the PIX key, and pay the USDT QR Code. Your wallet and PIX key are the only identification required.

q3.question: Which USDT network do you accept?
q3.answer: We operate on the most-used USDT network: Polygon (USDT.POL).

q5.question: What if PIX doesn't arrive?
q5.answer: If PIX is not received within 15 minutes after the USDT payment is confirmed, the system automatically refunds the USDT to the return wallet you provided.

q6.question: How does the security work?
q6.answer: Every transaction has a traceable on-chain hash and unique internal ID. PIX settlement uses the official Brazilian payments network. The crypto conversion layer operates under OprPay in compliance with Brazilian service provider law and LGPD (Brazilian GDPR).

wizard.pixInvalid: Invalid PIX key. Check the details and try again.

step1.title: Set the amount
step1.sub: You pay in USDT on the Polygon network. Enter the amount in USDT or in reais; we convert it using the current dollar rate.
step1.hint: Minimum: 10 USDT · Maximum: R$ 99,000.00 per transaction.
step1.overLimit: The maximum is R$ 99,000.00 per transaction. Lower the amount to continue.

step2.title: Where we send the PIX
step2.sub: Choose the PIX key type and enter the key that should receive the amount in reais.
step2.hint: The PIX will be sent to this key as soon as the USDT transaction is confirmed on-chain.

step3.title: Return wallet and receipt
step3.sub: Use a {network} wallet you control. If anything goes wrong on-chain, we refund the USDT to it. The receipt goes to the email you provide.
step3.walletErrorPolygon: Invalid address for the Polygon network. Polygon uses the 0x + 40 hexadecimal characters format.

step4.title: Pay the QR Code
step4.sub: Send {amount} USDT over the {network} network to the address below. PIX arrives automatically.

verifying.title: Processing your swap
verifying.sub: We're confirming your payment and firing the PIX. This takes just a few seconds.
verifying.step2Sub: Validating the transaction on the USDT contract
verifying.step3Sub: Direct settlement on the official Brazilian network

receipt.label: Transfer Receipt
receipt.vpnPromo: Speed, security and freedom to browse.

expired.title: Time expired
expired.askSub: No worries. If you already sent the USDT, we'll locate your transaction and finish the PIX manually.
expired.hashSub: Paste the transaction hash (TXID). We'll open WhatsApp support with it to confirm and release your PIX.
expired.waMessage: Hi! I made the payment but the 15-min window expired. Here's the transaction hash to confirm: {hash} · Order: {order} · Amount: {amount} USDT
expired.sentSub: We opened WhatsApp support with your hash. Once we confirm the payment, your PIX is released (15 min to 2h).
expired.restartSub: Whenever you're ready to pay, we'll set everything up again in a second.
expired.thanksSub: It was a pleasure. Whenever you want to swap USDT for PIX, just come back. See you soon!
